title: Direct request body spread into create/update
description: Entire request body passed to data modification without field filtering.
remediation: Destructure only allowed fields: const { name, email } = req.body

title: Django model create with unfiltered request.data
description: Django REST serializer with __all__ fields exposes all model fields to modification.
remediation: Explicitly list allowed fields in serializer Meta.fields

title: Rails strong parameters bypass
description: Rails controller bypasses strong parameters or uses params without permit.
